name: Spiced Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Depending on the size of the potatoes, either leave them whole or quarter them, but do not cut them too small.
2. Chop the broccoli, reserving the inner stem and discarding the fibrous outside.
3. Chop the cauliflower head.
4. Over boiling water, steam the potatoes, broccoli stem, carrots, and cauliflower until tender (about 10 minutes).
5. Add the broccoli heads to the steamed vegetables and continue steaming until all vegetables are just tender.
6. In a heavy pot, sauté the onions in ghee until they are transparent.
7. Mix in the remaining steamed vegetables except for the broccoli.
8. Cover and cook for 6 to 8 minutes, stirring often.
9. Add the broccoli and continue cooking for another 5 minutes.
10. Serve with bread.
